title: Sword Armor Trims
description: Make all swords trimmable with all template and materials, upgrade your sword with more than 1300 different looks !
body:
<details>
<summary>get more trims for your items:</summary>

- Sword trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Mace trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-mace-trims
- Pickaxe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Axe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Shovel trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims

</details>



![sword trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0d6dc044a7420e784b4783228186c29c2e9ab34.png)

This dapack/mod make swords trimmable with any armor trim and any of the 11 smithing ingredients, making each sword type having exactly 199 variants (including the default one) for a grand total of 1393 different looking swords !!!


/!\ make sure to download the resourcepack ( https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack ) if you are using the datapack version or the mod version on a server !!!

![all netherite sword trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7FeSRrUo/images/0da65576b869709e1cda2aef3cadad3ba5e60fcb.webp)

You can turn any sword from wooden to netherite swords into a unique weapon by putting it on a smithing template with any armor trim and any smithing material, and make your sword fancier than ever !!!

![any sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce71eab86bff0dfd60f61e7a132bb4568159601a.webp)

This datapack/mod is serverside and fully vanilla compatible, players without the resourcepack/mod will only see a regular sword but players with the resourcepack/mod will see all sword trims !




If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !


Geyser/bedrock support : @Toxicdust on discord made a port of all the trims datapacks for GeyserMC, since those are not supported on modrinth, you can find it on the [discord server](https://discord.com/channels/1407508835643428988/1441199863831330929/1509831172174118956)
